reviews.comment:
No logro entender que no es compatible el descuento de cuenta DNI de mi marido con que yo soy socia del aca. No te toman ambos descuentos si son de personas distintas. Siempre hay cola

I don't understand why my husband's DNI account discount isn't compatible with my ACA membership. They won't accept both discounts if they're for different people. There's always a queue.

reviews.comment:
La atención es muy lenta, hay un solo empleado. Siempre hay fila, es insoportable, y cuando llegas lo más probable es que te digan que no tienen nafta.
No la recomiendo para nada.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very slow; there's only one employee. There's always a line, it's unbearable, and when you get there, they'll most likely tell you they're out of gas.
I don't recommend it at all.
